aronui.when_to_use: Use this tool to retrieve the list of current automation notes with their created_at timestamps, typically shown in the automation calendar Note section.
aronui.output_shape: The tool returns a string message. Currently, it always returns 'No automation notes yet. Use add_automation_note to add one.' This indicates no notes exist. When notes are added, it will return a list of notes.

pitfalls.text: No arguments are required; the tool accepts any input without error. Even passing extra properties, strings, or null results in a success message. No error text has been observed for missing, empty, o

procedure: Call the tool with an empty object {} as the argument.
The tool will return a string indicating the current automation notes.
verification: If the tool returns 'No automation notes yet. Use add_automation_note to add one.', it confirms the tool executed successfully and no notes exist.
If notes exist, the tool will return a list of notes with created_at timestamps.
